name: Womens Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses - Universal Thread™ Tortoise Brown: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Add a sleek, on-trend style to your accessories collection with the Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses from Universal Thread™. These square sunglasses feature a tortoiseshell-print brown frame with gray lenses for an eye-catching look. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. Made of 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these tortoiseshell-print sunglasses fit most faces.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
